data.raceComments: {"comment":"5. PERFORMING DIVA faded right out of it last time over 1300m at Canberra after showing good early speed and leading for much of the way, when finishing eighth. Finds an easier race and goes well on her home track. Take catching. 8. LUCILAGO was out of the money when resuming two runs back then again missed the frame last start when ninth over 1300m at Hawkesbury. Finds a more suitable contest and can turn things around. 9. TILLMAN finished out of the money two starts back then he got a long way back when sixth over 1600m at the Sapphire Coast. Beautifully placed and is sure to take plenty of stopping on the back-up. 2. MISSILE DEFENCE doesn't win very often but ran a nice race last time out over 1425m at Moruya, finishing second. Well placed and should be about the money.","runners":[5,8,9,2],"exclusive":false}

extraMarkets.name: GOULBURN-R4-Fav Out
extraMarkets.message: Must finish 1st or 2nd behind N/A Runner
